{{CargoOrgan
|name=Time Energy Block
|type=Common
|rank=orange
|id=10882
|idx=89
|description="…Implantation trial of Subject #11 concluded successfully with no acute rejection observed. However, sporadic temporal interference manifestations were noted on the epidermis, accompanied by a 15% acceleration in mundane object decay rates. Actual hazard classification remains pending…"
—Chronon Energy Block Research Report
|skill=
|hp=2244
|def=186
|atk=206
|rush=228
|gene1=Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +5%
|gene2=Fire DMG +90
|gene3=Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +5%
|gene4=Wind DMG +90
|gene5=Time Machine Travel Speedup Output +5%
|gene7=Wind DMG +1.5% (Awakened)
|}}
